3084500.name: Ephemeral Night
3084500.description: Under the pressure of fading time, face a relentless series of challenges that push your shooting skills to the limit. Navigate through a dynamic arena where every shot counts, and the color of your gun is constantly shifting. Strategically destroy boxes to change your gun’s color, transforming your bullets to match the vibrant targets that appear. Hone your skills, outsmart the obstacles, and dominate the color-coded chaos in this fast-paced, action-packed test of reflexes and strategy.
3084500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
